_comment: CHAMPION CYNTHIA — Royal League champion intro (The Standing Throne). A per-leader copy of leader_intro.json (the shared scene cannot carry a name title), reusing Cicada's takehara_leader_intro geometry VERBATIM — the same relative+facingFrame+endBack:7 chaining so gym/engage/engage_royal_champion still opens the battle from the endBack stage. Structure mirrors leader_intro: pull up over the challenger's shoulder framing Cynthia, then a TIGHT ZOOM-IN dolly to her face (the z:-8.5 -> z:-6.8 close hold), cross high for a side profile, then drop home. startTitle names her; a coronation/throne theme — raid horn + beacon activate open, the challenge-complete fanfare and beacon power-select land the seat-of-power reveal, with totem_of_undying + end_rod particles crowning her. Champion has no uuid, so particles anchor off the CHALLENGER'S look frame (execute at @s positioned ^ ^1 ^7) toward where she stands, like Cicada. IN-WORLD TUNING NEEDED: air-verify the ^-offset and the zoom-keyframe framing at the real Royal League throne [3528 166 2773] and nudge as needed. endBack 7 MUST match leader_intro so the post-scene battle opens correctly.

cues.command: execute at @s positioned ^ ^1 ^7 run particle minecraft:totem_of_undying ~ ~ ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
execute at @s positioned ^ ^1 ^7 run particle minecraft:end_rod ~ ~ ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
